text:
is a Shinkalion Z that was “What if Unit-02 of “500 TYPE EVA” existed? "Shinkansen 500 TYPE EVA-02" is an original design drawn based on the imagination. A toy was released as an action figure on 10 December 2022. 新幹線変形ロボ シンカリオンZ シンカリオンZ 500 TYPE EVA-02 at Takara Tomy Mall Webpage (Archived) 

Profile

Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA-02 is a bipedal robot whose body is composed of different parts of the 500 TYPE EVA train that is similar to Evangelion Unit-02. There are several characteristic elements of the Evangelion, like the head of Unit-02. The colours of Unit-02: red and orange with white details are also present. A headgear is also included, so it can be changed. 

Weapons

Two new types of weapons were created: 

It is based on the Pallet Rifle 

A weapon that was inspired by the Positron Rifle (Prototype 20 with Toroidal Accelerator) and ticket gate scissors (a tool used to cut tickets at the ticket gates). https://web.archive.org/web/20230113153514/https://hobby.dengeki.com/news/1699132/

Development

A transformable toy was made by , under the line Plarail Z Combine: Plarail Shinkalion Z 500 TYPE EVA-02 on 10 December 2022 for ¥7,480 (tax included). https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gI1001003/
